title: CSWA – SolidWorks Associate Certification
description: Industry-recognized certification in parametric 3D modeling and design using SolidWorks.
text: Certified SolidWorks Associate credential earned by demonstrating proficiency in creating and modifying 3D models, assemblies, and engineering drawings under timed conditions.

title: CSWP – SolidWorks Professional Certification
description: Advanced certification validating professional-level proficiency in SolidWorks parametric design.
text: Certified SolidWorks Professional credential earned by demonstrating advanced skills in parametric modeling, design modifications, configurations, and mass property analysis through timed engineering design challenges.
